'''Rad Torlent''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[junior officer]] serving aboard a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. A native of [[Neutra Four]], Torlent joined the Rebels after the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] seized his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. Shortly after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Torlent was aboard his [[Starship/Legends|ship]] when it was attacked by [[13-K]], an augmented [[Infiltrator probe droid]] sent by Imperial [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Damon Krell]] to seize the vessel and use it to decimate the Rebel [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]]. Torlent played dead as 13-K moved through the ship, methodically [[Death/Legends|killing]] his comrades, before making a break for the ship's communications terminal to warn Rebel leadership. Unfortunately for Torlent, the terminal was located in the room 13-K had made its destination, and the [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droid]] killed him moments before he could send his crucial message.<ref name="marvel45" />

==Behind the scenes==
Rad Torlent first appeared in [[Star Wars (1977) 45|''Star Wars'' (1977) 45]], written by [[Archie Goodwin]] and released in [[1980]]. In the comic, Torlent was illustrated by [[Carmine Infantino]].<ref name="marvel45" />
